name: GitLab
description: This app integrates with a GitLab instance to perform various lookups and execute CI/CD pipelines

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: List all the users in the GitLab instance

actions.name: List Projects
actions.description: List all the projects in the GitLab instance

actions.name: List Branches
actions.description: List the branches of a GitLab project

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the GitLab project

actions.name: Create Trigger
actions.description: Create a new pipeline trigger for a GitLab project

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the GitLab project

parameters.name: trigger_name
parameters.description: The name of the new trigger

actions.name: List Triggers
actions.description: List the pipeline triggers of a GitLab project

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the GitLab project

actions.name: Run Pipeline
actions.description: Execute a pipeline on a particular branch of a project

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the GitLab project

parameters.name: trigger_token
parameters.description: The trigger token required for executing a pipeline

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: The branch containing the .gitlab-ci.yml file to run. Defaults to 'master'
